parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'monitor', workflow: $json.workflow?.name || 'unknown', level: ($json.error?.message || '').includes('401') || ($json.error?.message || '').includes('Unauthorized') ? 'critical' : ($json.error?.message || '').includes('timeout') || ($json.error?.message || '').includes('rate limit') ? 'warning' : 'error', message: $json.error?.message || 'Workflow execution failed', payload: { node_name: $json.execution?.nodeError?.name, execution_id: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }) }}

_meta.templateNotes: Error Trigger catches errors from ALL other workflows — connect in n8n UI. Add TikTok Creator API calls inside Fire Due Performance Polls for perf_24h and perf_72h data retrieval. Add auto-retry: stuck video_jobs UPDATE status=queued after alerting.
